name: No Response Escalation
description: If no response is received 3 days after outbound communication, escalates to the sales manager.
descriptionAr: إذا لم يُستلم رد خلال ٣ أيام من التواصل الصادر، يصعّد الأمر لمدير المبيعات.

config.title: No response: {{contact.name}}
config.body: No reply in 3 days after outreach to {{contact.name}}. Consider escalating or trying a different channel.
